items.summary: arXiv:2604.18597v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Tidal disruption event (TDE) rates in active galactic nuclei (AGN) consistently exceed predictions from two-body relaxation, particularly in post-starburst and green valley galaxies. We explain this excess with a new mechanism: a sw…

items.summary: arXiv:2604.18664v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Asteroid mining can become an enabling technology to establish a sustainable manned colony on Mars, which requires metallic materials more often than they are readily available in shipments from Earth. This paper describes a feasibi…
